use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with animated gradient borders for visual emphasis
Creating premium-feeling interactive elements with continuous motion effects
Enhancing outline buttons with dynamic border animations that draw attention
Adding subtle animation to form submission or navigation buttons
Highlighting key user actions in landing pages or feature sections
ai_summary: A button component featuring an animated gradient border effect that continuously travels along the button's perimeter using CSS mask-clip and offset-path properties with Framer Motion for smooth animation. The component wraps a standard outline button and adds a decorative animated border layer, creating a visually striking CTA element suitable for modern web applications.
